message:
I've been thinking about what actually goes into a solid emergency kit—you know, beyond just throwing random stuff in a box and hoping for the best. Turns out there's a pretty straightforward checklist that makes the whole thing way less overwhelming. The nice part is that most of it's stuff you probably already have around the house, so it's more about organizing than stressing.

What's one item you already keep on hand that you'd definitely grab if you had to leave quickly?
